details: The agent correctly executed all necessary commands and produced a complete, accurate answer. It recognized that the initial 30-result page wasn't the total issue count and followed up with a search query to get the actual total (9,239), which is in the thousands range consistent with known facts. It retrieved 5 specific merged PRs with titles and authors from actual tool output. It also correctly retrieved the latest release tag (v2026.3.23). No hallucination detected — all data came from actual command outputs.
